name: 02-wrong-checkout
description: Bootstrap on a PR but the cwd is the wrong repo (or the wrong branch). Bootstrap aborts with a clear remediation snippet — no state files written, no watcher dispatched.

user_facing_message: Bootstrap needs the PR's branch checked out locally.
Expected:       a clone of acme/widget on branch feat/foo.
From that clone, run: gh pr checkout 142
expected.notes: Bootstrap aborts BEFORE writing any state file. The cursor is never resolved (Step 6 doesn't run). No /loop dispatch. No telemetry event — bootstrap didn't succeed. The user fixes their cwd and re-runs.
